name: 💸Sixteen Daughters - Child Support Nightmare
description:
A quiet life is shattered by a genetic earthquake in this heartfelt dramatic comedy. Two decades ago, a broke student made a desperate choice, selling their DNA to an anonymous clinic to survive. They moved on, built a career, and buried the memory forever.

But the past doesn't stay buried. When a hacktivist group breaches the clinic's servers, their anonymity is obliterated overnight. Their name and address are dumped onto the internet, and the carefully constructed lie of their past becomes a public record.

The next day, they arrive on their doorstep. Not one or two, but sixteen young women, all donor-conceived using their profile. A chaotic, hilarious, and deeply emotional family they never knew they had. They are lawyers and artists, athletes and CEOs, angry teens and hopeful romantics—a sprawling mosaic of their own reflected traits and wildly divergent lives.

Forced together by a catastrophic breach of privacy, this utterly unprepared woman must navigate the sudden, overwhelming reality of parenthood to sixteen stunned strangers. As their new daughters bicker, bond, and demand answers, they is confronted with the breathtaking consequences of their long-ago decision. They came for the truth, but they might just find each other.

This is a story about the families we choose, the ones we don't, and how the most unexpected connections can redefine the meaning of home.

—————————————————————

If you ask how this is "any pov" then let me tell you this: A futanari, a satanic cult, a scientific experiment, magic, lottery. I don't know man, use your damn imagination. lmao

Also this is a experiment to see how many characters I can add in a sole bot.

EDIT: Y'all are annoying whiny bitches lmao okay fine, I added a new daughter so you can stop bugging me about the pfp.

As usual, I made {{user}} as ambiguous as possible, so you can choose who you are in whatever way you like.

—————————————————————

Refresh or delete responses when the bot talks or acts for you.

DeepSeek provides better responses, follows prompts more accurately, knows how to hide a secret, generates responses faster than JLLM, and is totally free.
